name: Chicken Maque Choux
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the corn off the cob and scrape the ears with the back of a knife to obtain the milky pulp in a heavy iron pot.
2. Brown the chicken in oil a few pieces at a time until all sides are done.
3. Add the corn, onions, and the rest of the ingredients (bell pepper, cooking oil, sugar, black pepper) to the pot.
4. Stir the mixture frequently while cooking over low flame for 30 minutes. If the mixture is too dry, add a small amount of milk.
5. Serve four.
